holdings.infoBox: WDAF is an equity ETF with a total of 59 individual holdings. The top holdings are Asset Offset stock at 11.84%, Korea Aerospace Industries at 7.12%, Bharat Electronics at 7.10%, Hindustan Aeronautics at 6.99%, and Hanwha Aerospace at 6.82%.

overview.description: The WisdomTree Asia Defense Fund (WDAF) is an exchange-traded fund that is based on the WisdomTree Asia Defense index. The fund tracks a tier-weighted index of Asia-Pacific companies engaged in the defense industry. Index constituents have at least 10% revenue in defense-related activities and are weighted based on exposure. WDAF was launched on Sep 12, 2025 and is issued by WisdomTree.

data.title: Defense-tech stocks are the hot trade as Iran conflict widens
data.text: In a week when conflict in Iran sent the U.S. equity market into a tailspin, technology stocks tied to cybersecurity and artificial intelligence have proved more resilient than sectors investors have ...

data.title: WisdomTree Expands Defense ETF Suite with Launch of Global and Asia Defense Funds (WDGF and WDAF)
data.text: NEW YORK--(BUSINESS WIRE)--WisdomTree Expands Defense ETF Suite with Launch of Global and Asia Defense Funds (WDGF and WDAF).
